text.message: I just didn't want you to slam brick port and not discuss

but you can play that game if you want, i can go 8/10 or something
11 has cooked in some of my recent games
yeah thats what i was thinkin
I just don't get why 9 brick over 9 4 2 is better pointing to 6 wheat
you are right , i made mistake
Can we share the robs with green please
i feel like I am getting over robbed here
youve been robbed twice and once only cause i didnt have cards
3 times i thought, could be wrong though
yeah i was 1 wood short of taking that spot like 3 turns in a row
Gotta share robs at start of game, he's just dominating now
lol you got 2 robs before you started complaining
its also different soloing someone at the beginning
and hes only in this cause 6 has rolled like 5 times in the last 2 turns
Open board and strong wheat port my road is nothing,
i feel a nasty mono coming up here
need the dice to start helping me out
im spending all my resources here to extend game by having road and getting solo'd
i mean he could have like 7 less cards right now
i hope it works out and you win from it
